vocab.meaning: biểu tượng của địa vị xã hội
vocab.example: For many high-fliers, a luxury watch serves as a potent status symbol to signal their professional success.

vocab.meaning: nghệ thuật chế tác đồng hồ bậc thầy
vocab.example: Connoisseurs often invest in expensive timepieces to appreciate the intricate horological craftsmanship involved.

vocab.meaning: một món đồ gia bảo (truyền đời)
vocab.example: Some people purchase premium watches with the intention of keeping them as an heirloom piece for future generations.
In the corporate world, a classic Swiss watch can help an individual exude professionalism during high-stakes meetings.

vocab.meaning: tăng giá trị theo thời gian
vocab.example: Certain limited-edition watches are seen as smart investments because they tend to appreciate in value over the years.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Beyond mere utility, the aesthetic allure of a diamond-encrusted watch is what attracts many wealthy buyers.

vocab.meaning: tiêu dùng phô trương (mua đồ đắt tiền để khoe khoang)
vocab.example: Expensive watches are sometimes criticized as a form of conspicuous consumption in modern society.

vocab.meaning: độ chính xác không đối thủ
vocab.example: Purists argue that the unrivaled precision of a high-end mechanical movement justifies its staggering price tag.
Owning a prestigious watch brand is often seen as a testament to one's refined taste and financial stability.

vocab.meaning: khiến người khác phải nể trọng
vocab.example: A subtle yet expensive watch on the wrist can sometimes help a person command respect in conservative business circles.
